commit.subject: LU-20150 gss: always use sg_table to preset ahash_request
commit.message:
LU-20150 gss: always use sg_table to preset ahash_request

Since there are cases where a buffer spans on two pages and
thus a sg_table must be setup/allocated, always use it to
reference the scatterlist.

Signed-off-by: Bruno Faccini <bfaccini@nvidia.com>
Change-Id: I54d884fe69884b6a455075d29ab754534a26af4a
